name: paranoid-confusable-regression-fixture
description: Regression fixture for the paranoid-mode confusable-substring check. Mixes legitimate package names that happen to contain confusable bigrams (yarn, intern, return) with a synthetic typosquat (cornrnander, which substitutes 'rn'->'m' to impersonate commander). The detector should flag ONLY the synthetic typosquat under --paranoid; the legitimate names must NOT be flagged.
